name: io.github.atomno-mcp/mcp-fns-calc
description: Russian tax calculators (VAT, USN, ИП contributions, progressive NDFL 2025+, patent, penalty) offline + fiscal-status checks (self-employed/НПД, ИП/ОКВЭД, disqualified, account blocks, arrears) via hosted API.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_FNS_CALC_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for live fiscal-status checks and fresh rates. Calculators work without it.
